html:
“Will reveal users location on the map to other survivors also holding a Compass.”

-

The Compass is an equippable item that requires 1 Gold Nugget and 1 Flint to craft. It is equipped in the hand slot and has a durability of 4 days. A small compass icon opens up above the hand slot showing the player the direction they are facing. However, during Full Moon, the handle will spin instead of showing a consistent direction. When the player's sanity is below 33%, the compass will begin to turn in a direction by an exponential amount of degrees that relates to the player's sanity. Between 33% and 20%, the compass will spin a set 90 degrees (the compass will turn from west to east, and then from east to west if the player is facing north).

Equipping a Compass will also reveal the location of other players that have a Compass equipped, even in unexplored areas. This can be very helpful, especially when playing in Wilderness Mode. The compass is also used to craft the Ocuvigil and the Cartographer's Desk.

Winona will report the opposite of whatever direction she is actually facing, which contradicts with her quote "I'm pretty good with directions.".

Usage

×4

×2

×2

Trivia

  • The Compass was introduced in the It's Not A Rock! update.
  • The Golden Compass may be a reference to the American edition of the first book of the famous His Dark Materials trilogy, by Philip Pullman, later made into a movie.
  • Prior to the Staying Afloat update, many players would use a Compass to orient themselves at a specific point of the old Crab King fight in order to only have to fight off two Imposing Claws at a time, instead of three.
    • Later, players also learned that the plank of a Boat could be used to accomplish the same thing without needing a Compass.
    • Since Crab King has been reworked, this strategy is not as useful, although some players still use it for very specific fighting methods.

Gallery

  • Idle
  • Wilson with a compass equipped in Don't Starve Together.
  • The compass icon that appears when equipped in Don't Starve Together.
  • Wilson in starting position, showing screen orientation as northeast.
  • Compass as seen in the poster for the East or West, Base is Best update.

“Which way am I facing?”
–Wilson
“Can't get a reading.”
–Willow
“Is all directions, but no directions.”
–Wolfgang
“I am directionless.”
–Wendy
“UNABLE TO OBTAIN BEARINGS”
–WX-78
“The coordinates remain unknown.”
–Wickerbottom
“Points to the True North.”
–Woodie
“I've lost my way.”
–Maxwell
“A reading cannöt be gleaned.”
–Wigfrid
“No reading!”
–Webber
“Hmm, no reading.”
–Warly
“Which way?”
–Wormwood
“I'm pretty good with directions.”
–Winona
“For when up is down and down is out.”
–Wortox
“There spinny needle inside!”
–Wurt
“The Pinetree Pioneer handbook says to always bring a compass!”
–Walter
“If only it could tell me which way is past and which way is future.”
–Wanda
“Will reveal users location on the map to other survivors also holding a Compass.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

La Bàn là một vật phẩm có thể trang bị được và cần 1 Vàng Thỏi và 1 Đá Lửa để chế tạo. Nó được trang bị trong slot tay và có độ bền là 4 ngày. Một biểu tượng la bàn nhỏ mở ra phía trên khe tay cho người chơi biết hướng họ đang hướng tới. Tuy nhiên, trong thời gian Trăng tròn, tay cầm sẽ quay thay vì hiển thị một hướng nhất quán. Khi tinh thần của người chơi dưới 33%, la bàn sẽ bắt đầu quay theo hướng theo cấp số nhân liên quan đến tinh thần của người chơi. Trong khoảng từ 33% đến 20%, la bàn sẽ quay một bộ 90 độ (la bàn sẽ quay từ tây sang đông…

{{Navbutton/Separation}} {{Object Infobox |damage = 10 |equipslot=hands |icon = Compass (DST).png |image = Compass DST Dropped.png |perk = Shows the direction the map is rotated.
Shows the location of other players carrying a compass. |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "compass" |ingredient1 = Gold Nugget |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Flint |multiplier2 = 1 |wearsOut=4 days |filter = {{Pic32|Tools Filter}} |tier = Always available |description = Points the way north.}} {{Quotes |wilson = Which way am I facing? |willow = Can't get a reading. |wolfgang = Is all directions, but no directions. |wendy = I am directionless. |wx78 = UNABLE TO OBTAIN BEARINGS |wickerbottom = The coordinates remain unknown. |woodie = Points to the True North. |maxwell = I've lost my way. |wigfrid = A reading cannöt be gleaned. |webber = No reading! |winona = I'm pretty good with directions. |warly = Hmm, no reading. |wortox = For when up is down and down is out. |wormwood = Which way? |wurt = There spinny needle inside! |walter = The Pinetree Pioneer handbook says to always bring a compass! |wanda = If only it could tell me which way is past and which way is future. |choose = wolfgang }} {{Scrapbook Info|Will reveal users location on the map to other survivors also holding a Compass.}} The '''Compass''' is an equippable [[item]] that requires 1 [[Gold Nugget]] and 1 [[Flint]] to craft. It is equipped in the hand slot and has a durability of 4 days. A small compass icon opens up above the hand slot showing the player the direction they are facing. However, during [[Moon Cycle/DST|Full Moon]], the handle will spin instead of showing a consistent direction. When the player's sanity is below 33%, the compass will begin to turn in a direction by an exponential amount of degrees that relates to the player's [[sanity]]. Between 33% and 20%, the compass will spin a set 90 degrees (the compass will turn from west to east, and then from east to west if the player is facing north). Equipping a Compass will also reveal the location of other players that have a Compass equipped, even in unexplored areas. This can be very helpful, especially when playing in [[Don't Starve Together|Wilderness Mode]]. The compass is also used to craft the [[Ocuvigil]] and the [[Cartographer's Desk]]. Winona will report the opposite of whatever direction she is actually facing, which contradicts with her quote "I'm pretty good with directions.". =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item2 = Boards |count2 = 4 |item1 = Compass |count1 = 1 |Science 1 = yes |result = Cartographer's Desk}} {{Recipe |item2 = Boards |count2 = 2 |item1 = Compass |count1 = 1 |item3 = Purple Moonlens |count3 = 1 |Magic 1 = yes |result = Ocuvigil}} {{Recipe |item1 = Compass |count1 = 1 |item2 = Bio Data |count2 = 2 |result = Rangebooster Circuit |tool = Bio Scanalyzer |character = WX-78 }} {{Recipe |item1 = Compass |item2 = Electrical Doodad |result = Roto-Mapper |skill = Field Survey I |character = WX-78 }} =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * The Compass was introduced in the ''[[Version History#It's not a rock!|It's Not A Rock!]]'' update. * The Golden Compass may be a reference to the American edition of the first book of the famous ''[[Wikipedia:His Dark Materials|His Dark Materials]]'' trilogy, by Philip Pullman, later made into a movie. * Prior to the [[From_Beyond#Staying_Afloat|Staying Afloat]] update, many players would use a Compass to orient themselves at a specific point of the old [[Crab King/Old|Crab King]] fight in order to only have to fight off two [[Crab_King/Old#Imposing_Claw|Imposing Claws]] at a time, instead of three. ** Later, players also learned that the plank of a [[Boat]] could be used to accomplish the same thing without needing a Compass. ** Since Crab King has been reworked, this strategy is not as useful, although some players still use it for very specific fighting methods. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Compass Idle.gif|Idle Wilson with Compass DST.png|Wilson with a compass equipped in ''Don't Starve Together''. Compass Icon.png|The compass icon that appears when equipped in ''Don't Starve Together''. Starting_orientation.png|Wilson in starting position, showing screen orientation as northeast.
